*Module**: Logos Blockchain
**Layer**: L1
**Doc status**: Unverified
**Doc type**: Quickstart

## Description
Guides node operators through the steps to initialise, stake, and run a Logos L1 blockchain validator node, enabling them to actively participate in consensus on the Testnet v0.1 network.
